media-controller._comment: Tokens for <OrigamMediaController>. The shell controls bar shared by <OrigamVideo> and <OrigamAudio> — owns scrubber row + play/volume/time on the left + cog/cast/extras on the right.

scrubber._comment: Override of the inner <OrigamMediaScrubber> colour when used as the timeline scrubber inside the controls bar. Falls through to the scrubber default when unset.
